message:
feat(connectors): add provisioning automation for 5 connectors

Implement ProvisioningRecipe, provisioning_readiness(), and enhanced
self_check for grafana, datadog, elasticsearch, 1password, and salesforce.
Each connector gets recipe steps (auth mode selection, secret prompts,
credential storage), network validation, and 7-16 new provisioning tests.

Also fixes pre-existing elasticsearch lifecycle_introspect test that
asserted a non-existent connector_id field on Introspection struct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
